query:
INSERT INTO activityLog (eventType, actorName, actorRole, entityName, description) VALUES
('partner_approved', 'Admin', 'admin', 'Dallas Lawn Pros', 'Partner application approved and activated'),
('deal_created', 'System', 'system', 'Roof Inspection — 4521 Oak St', 'AI detected roofing opportunity from job photos'),
('deal_accepted', 'Sarah Johnson', 'homeowner', 'Window Cleaning Deal', 'Homeowner accepted deal and signed estimate request'),
('payout_processed', 'Admin', 'admin', 'Texas Pest Control', 'Commission payout of $142.50 processed via Stripe'),
('review_submitted', 'Mike Torres', 'homeowner', 'DFW Pressure Washing', '5-star review submitted — Google Review request triggered'),
('broadcast_sent', 'Admin', 'admin', NULL, 'Broadcast sent to 795 approved partners: New Feature: Public Profile Pages'),
('verification_updated', 'Admin', 'admin', 'Metroplex HVAC', 'License verification checkpoint marked as verified'),
('ai_analysis', 'System', 'system', 'Job #1042', 'GPT-4o Vision detected 3 opportunities (confidence: 0.87, 0.74, 0.61)'),
('partner_approved', 'Admin', 'admin', 'Plano Pool Service', 'Partner application approved and activated'),
('user_login', 'James Williams', 'partner', NULL, 'Partner logged in from Dallas, TX'),
('deal_created', 'System', 'system', 'Pest Control — 7823 Maple Ave', 'AI detected pest control opportunity from job photos'),
('partner_rejected', 'Admin', 'admin', 'Quick Fix Handyman', 'Application rejected: incomplete insurance documentation'),
('payout_processed', 'Admin', 'admin', 'Frisco Fence Co', 'Commission payout of $89.00 processed via Stripe'),
('review_submitted', 'Linda Chen', 'homeowner', 'Allen Tree Service', '4-star review submitted'),
('settings_changed', 'Admin', 'admin', NULL, 'Commission rate updated for Pest Control category: 8% → 9%');
